content.text:
All tests pass. The blinker test was already passing because the previously implemented general algorithm (computing live neighbors over all candidate cells including dead neighbors) handles oscillators correctly without any further changes.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No changes required - the existing general implementation already satisfies the blinker oscillation behavior
- Result: All tests now pass (6 passing, 2 todo)
- Approach: The minimal implementation from prior cycles (using a Set of live cells + checking all candidate cells including dead neighbors with the survives rule) is sufficient to handle the blinker oscillation. No additional code was demanded by this test.
